note: Round-2 chunk_size probe (text). Round-1's chunk_size winner (4096) was the grid EDGE, so this cheaply tests whether 8192 is better, holding the round-1 winner's adaptation config fixed (lr 3e-4, r 32, epochs 3, attn-only). train_interval PINNED to 2: keeps the encode batch small enough for a 40GB card ([2,8192]=16K tokens; round 1 OOM'd at [16,4096]=64K) AND compensates for the fewer chunks a larger chunk_size makes (more updates). If 8192 wins, pin chunk_size=8192 downstream; else 4096 is confirmed. Runs alongside search_text.json (which pins chunk 4096).
